case_title: LIBOON, SOFRONIO VS MALAYA, MARY ANN LIBOON

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL SENT TO MARY ANN LIBOON MALAYA RETURNED SIGNED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY LIBOON, SOFRONIO AS TO DEFENDANT MALAYA, MARY ANN LIBOON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-28-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-04-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIBOON, SOFRONIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MALAYA, MARY ANN LIBOON DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. PLTF DID NOT MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-17-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-28-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT WAIVED DEFECTIVE SERVICE.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
